channel.title: R on Just be-cause
channel.description: Recent content in R on Just be-cause

item.title: "Correlation is not causation". So what is?
item.description: Intro Machine learning applications have been growing in volume and scope rapidly over the last few years. What’s Causal inference, how is it different than plain good ole’ ML and when should you consider using it? In this report I try giving a short and concrete answer by using an example. A typical data science task Imagine we’re tasked by the marketing team to find the effect of raising marketing spend on sales.
